title: M21 History Coverage Targeting For Corporate Actions

items.title: Sync CLI supports rolling lookback windows
items.description: Market-data sync can resolve a rolling backfill window from the latest source biz date via --lookback-open-days.

items.title: history_backfill supports lookback_open_days
items.description: The history_backfill service path, queue payload, worker and HTTP API all accept lookback_open_days in addition to explicit date ranges.

items.title: Scheduler can treat insufficient history coverage as unsettled
items.description: When QUANTA_HISTORY_BACKFILL_TARGET_OPEN_DAYS is configured, the scheduler will enqueue history_backfill until the latest READY snapshot covers at least the target window.

items.title: Health and live backfill outputs expose coverage depth
items.description: System health returns history_coverage, and tushare_live_backfill_smoke reports history_coverage and corporate_action_check to show whether reconciliation is progressing from out_of_coverage to checked/aligned.
